name: create-voice-persona
description: Build a complete, reusable voice persona package for any person from examples of their real writing — the generalised factory behind the create-luke-content pattern. Mines a writing corpus into an evidence-anchored base voice (every rule traced to a quoted sample), layers purpose-tailored persona variants on top (LinkedIn posts as the flagship, grounded in bundled LinkedIn engagement deep research plus any user-supplied research; plus long-form, marketing, short-form, chat, email, code review, speaker notes), generates a per-person deterministic voice lint, and bundles a distilled 'Signs of AI writing' field guide (from Wikipedia's WP:AISIGNS) so everything the persona writes avoids every known AI tell. Delivers a ready-to-install create-X-content plugin skill or a portable docs folder. v1.1 adds a stylometric layer grounded in voice-replication research: word-count corpus grading, syntactic-fingerprint extraction (sentence rhythm, contractions, nominalizations) enforced as lint advisories, anchor-diversity and style/content-entanglement rules, NNG tone dials per variant, and long-form drift re-anchoring. v1.3 adds an owner-feedback maintenance loop (corrections as highest-grade evidence, fix-the-class discipline, retired-phrase mechanism) plus guards distilled from real owner reviews: signature-phrase rations, distribution-not-formula rhythm, referent discipline, audience-knowledge floor, register fencing, and a self-narrating meta-label tell. v1.4 adds the empirical research layer to the bundled AI-signs field guide (quantified structural tells from 2023-2026 corpus studies, the 99.6% expert-detection and AI Penalty evidence, structure-vs-texture discipline, epigram budgets, epistemic stance markers, flatten-and-reconstruct guidance) and threads the new guards through the package blueprint and self-check.
